flow_points: India struggled early, losing 4 wickets for 46 runs in the Powerplay, failing to build a stable foundation.
SC van Schalkwyk delivered a crucial spell for USA, taking 4 wickets for 25 runs.
SA Yadav anchored India's innings with 84(50), contributing 52.2% of the total runs.
India shifted momentum with a high-scoring finish in Death Overs, achieving a run rate of 13.4.
Mohammad Mohsin (1/16) and Ali Khan (economy 6.5) provided economical spells for USA.
However, SN Netravalkar struggled with an expensive economy of 16.25.
Chasing, United States of America also lost 3 wickets for 31 runs in their Powerplay.
Arshdeep Singh was outstanding for India, taking 2 wickets for 19 runs with an economy of 4.75.
Mohammed Siraj (3/30) and AR Patel (2/24) sustained defensive pressure through crucial spells for India.
United States of America struggled under extreme chase pressure, leading to a late-innings collapse.
